name: Nevermore - Documentary Kinetic Novel
short_description: Documentary kinetic novel. From the place of a heroin dealer detention. On the backside of a drug’s pop image.
detailed_description:
Documentary kinetic novel. From the place of a heroin dealer detention. On the backside of a drug’s pop image.

In sleeping areas of Moscow outskirts where supplications, inevitable diagnosis and inappeasable demon of addiction are present.

First of all, this is an artistic manipulation with word and form, only then - a game.

Features:
  • Short duration (10-15 minutes)
  • Unique graphic style
  • Authentic audio solutions
